response.step_by_step_log: I identified the three songs in the concert medley ('Kaikai Kitan', 'Gira Gira', 'Dappou Rock') by referencing on-screen credits at the beginning of each song segment. I then performed web searches for each song to confirm the original artist (Eve, Ado, Neru) and obtain representative snippets of the lyrics in both Japanese and English. I mapped the performances to the Hololive ID members visible in each scene. The search strings used were: "Kaikai Kitan" Eve Japanese and English lyrics, "Gira Gira" Ado Japanese and English lyrics, and "Dappou Rock" Neru Japanese and English lyrics.
response.global_summary: A 3-song concert medley performed by Hololive ID VTubers, featuring 'Kaikai Kitan' (Eve), 'Gira Gira' (Ado), and 'Dappou Rock' (Neru).

scenes.description: Performance of 'Kaikai Kitan' by Moona, Ollie, Reine, and Anya.
scenes.performer_in_video: Moona, Ollie, Reine, and Anya (Hololive ID)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 嗚呼、　回る　回る　回る　回る　回る　回る　回る...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Ah, the way you laugh, the way you look, it's all so confusing. I need to know, I need to know everything.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Gira Gira' by Moona, Ollie, Reine, Anya, and Zeta.
scenes.performer_in_video: Moona, Ollie, Reine, Anya, and Zeta (Hololive ID)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: ギラギラ輝いて　誰かのようになれたらいいのにな...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Glittering, glittering, the world is too bright, too loud. I'm just tired of all the expectations.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Dappou Rock' by Moona, Kobo, and Kaela.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 脱法ロック　全部脱ぎ捨てて　踊り明かそうぜ...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Law-evading rock, let's break all the rules and dance until the end. Who cares about what they say?
